steps: Submit formal tax reclaim to Citigroup Australia for AUD 138,750 excess withholding on BHP dividend under AU-NO treaty
Provide Norwegian Tax Administration dividend documentation to prove eligibility for 15% treaty rate vs 25% standard rate
Reference AU-NO Double Taxation Agreement Article 10(2) specifying 15% maximum withholding on portfolio dividends
Request Citigroup process reclaim within 30 days or escalate to Australian Taxation Office treaty unit
